questionText: Em uma reunião de negócios, você precisa pedir a opinião de um colega sobre uma decisão importante. Como você faria isso de forma educada e profissional?
correctAnswer: I'd like to hear your thoughts on this matter before we proceed.
options: I'd like to hear your thoughts on this matter before we proceed.
Tell me what you think about this.
I need your opinion right now.
What's your take on this thing?

questionText: Você está apresentando uma proposta e quer concordar parcialmente com uma objeção do cliente, mas depois adicionar seu ponto de vista. Qual expressão é mais apropriada?
correctAnswer: While I understand your concern, I would argue that...
options: You're right, but I think differently.
While I understand your concern, I would argue that...
That doesn't make sense at all.
Maybe you're wrong about that.

questionText: Um cliente está expressando frustração com atrasos no projeto. Como você ofereceria uma solução mantendo o relacionamento profissional?
correctAnswer: I appreciate your patience, and I want to assure you we're taking immediate steps to address this.
options: Sorry about that, but these things happen.
I appreciate your patience, and I want to assure you we're taking immediate steps to address this.
There's nothing I can do about it now.
Don't worry, it will be fine eventually.

questionText: Você precisa recusar polida mas firmemente uma oferta de negócio que não é adequada para sua empresa. Qual resposta é mais apropriada?
correctAnswer: Thank you for the opportunity. While I appreciate the proposal, it doesn't align with our current strategic direction.
options: No, we don't want it.
Thank you for the opportunity. While I appreciate the proposal, it doesn't align with our current strategic direction.
That's not a good offer at all.
We can't do that.

questionText: Em uma negociação, você quer deixar claro que tem outras alternativas sem ser agressivo. Como você expressaria isso?
correctAnswer: We have other options we're exploring, but we'd prefer to work with you if terms are reasonable.
options: We're talking to your competitors too.
We have other options we're exploring, but we'd prefer to work with you if terms are reasonable.
You're not our only choice.
There are better companies than yours out there.

questionText: Você precisa estabelecer um deadline para uma entrega mantendo tom profissional. Como seria apropriado fazer isso?
options: You have to finish it by the end of the quarter.
We'll need to finalize this by the end of the quarter to stay on track with our objectives.
Get it done fast.
Don't be late with this.
correctAnswer: We'll need to finalize this by the end of the quarter to stay on track with our objectives.

questionText: Como você explicaria de forma clara a um stakeholder por que um investimento específico é crucial para o crescimento?
options: You should give us the money because we need it.
This investment is pivotal because it directly addresses our market expansion goals and will yield substantial returns.
It's important, so just do it.
We need money to grow.
correctAnswer: This investment is pivotal because it directly addresses our market expansion goals and will yield substantial returns.

questionText: Você recebe críticas sobre o desempenho do seu departamento. Como você responderia de forma construtiva?
options: We're doing fine, I don't know what you mean.
I acknowledge the feedback. We're committed to implementing improvements and would welcome suggestions for enhancement.
That's not true at all.
Maybe you're wrong about this.
correctAnswer: I acknowledge the feedback. We're committed to implementing improvements and would welcome suggestions for enhancement.

questionText: Como você diplomaticamente sugeriria uma mudança de estratégia durante uma reunião executiva?
options: I think the strategy is wrong.
Building on our previous discussion, I'd like to propose we consider an alternative approach that might better leverage our strengths.
We should change everything.
Your plan won't work.
correctAnswer: Building on our previous discussion, I'd like to propose we consider an alternative approach that might better leverage our strengths.

questionText: Você precisa informar a um cliente que ocorreu um erro que afetará o projeto. Como você comunicaria isso mantendo credibilidade?
options: We made a mistake, sorry.
I need to inform you of an issue we've identified. We're taking full responsibility and have already begun implementing corrective measures.
Something went wrong.
There's a problem, but it's not our fault really.
correctAnswer: I need to inform you of an issue we've identified. We're taking full responsibility and have already begun implementing corrective measures.

questionText: Como você cordialmente pediria a um parceiro para aumentar seu investimento em um projeto conjunto?
options: Give us more money.
Given the promising results, would you be open to increasing your commitment to capitalize on this opportunity?
You need to invest more.
Can you give us more cash?
correctAnswer: Given the promising results, would you be open to increasing your commitment to capitalize on this opportunity?

questionText: Você está em uma negociação sobre preço e quer justificar por que seu valor é mais alto. Qual resposta é mais eficaz?
options: Our price is the best.
Our pricing reflects the superior quality and comprehensive support we provide, which delivers substantial value over time.
Others charge more.
You get what you pay for.
correctAnswer: Our pricing reflects the superior quality and comprehensive support we provide, which delivers substantial value over time.

questionText: Como você concluiria profissionalmente uma negociação bem-sucedida?
options: Great, we're done.
Excellent. Let's document these terms and schedule a follow-up to ensure seamless implementation.
That works.
So that's settled then.
correctAnswer: Excellent. Let's document these terms and schedule a follow-up to ensure seamless implementation.

questionText: Como você elegantemente declinaria uma solicitação que sobrecarregaria sua equipe?
options: We're too busy.
While we're flattered by your request, we have existing commitments that require our full attention at this time.
No, that's too much work.
We can't help you right now.
correctAnswer: While we're flattered by your request, we have existing commitments that require our full attention at this time.

questionText: Você precisa motivar sua equipe após receber críticas sobre o desempenho. Como você faria isso?
options: Don't worry about it, we'll do better.
While we acknowledge the feedback, I'm confident in our capabilities and our collective commitment to achieving excellence.
Forget what they said.
We'll try harder.
correctAnswer: While we acknowledge the feedback, I'm confident in our capabilities and our collective commitment to achieving excellence.

questionText: Durante apresentação de resultados decepcionantes, como você reorientaria a conversa construtivamente?
options: The results are bad.
While these results underscore challenges, they provide valuable insights that inform our strategic pivot moving forward.
We didn't do well.
It didn't work out.
correctAnswer: While these results underscore challenges, they provide valuable insights that inform our strategic pivot moving forward.

questionText: Um colega levanta uma preocupação legítima em uma reunião de projeto. Como você responderia de forma colaborativa?
options: I don't think that's a problem.
That's a valid concern. Let's explore this further and determine how we can mitigate potential risks.
You're always worried about nothing.
Don't worry about that.
correctAnswer: That's a valid concern. Let's explore this further and determine how we can mitigate potential risks.

questionText: Você está conduzindo negociações delicadas com um fornecedor sobre termos de pagamento. Como você iniciaria a conversa mantendo um tom respeitoso?
options: We need you to give us better payment terms.
I appreciate our partnership. I'd like to discuss payment terms that would work more favorably for both parties.
Your payment terms are too strict.
You should make better offers.
correctAnswer: I appreciate our partnership. I'd like to discuss payment terms that would work more favorably for both parties.

questionText: Como você comunicaria a um investidor potencial por que seus números estão acima da média da indústria?
options: We're better than others.
Our metrics consistently outperform industry benchmarks due to our differentiated approach and operational excellence.
Our numbers are high.
We do better than competitors.
correctAnswer: Our metrics consistently outperform industry benchmarks due to our differentiated approach and operational excellence.

questionText: Você precisa renegociar um contrato existente. Como você frasearia a situação inicial?
options: We need to change the contract.
Given the evolving market conditions, I'd like to revisit certain provisions to ensure continued mutual benefit.
The contract isn't working anymore.
Let's redo this agreement.
correctAnswer: Given the evolving market conditions, I'd like to revisit certain provisions to ensure continued mutual benefit.

questionText: Como você explicaria diplomaticamente a um cliente por que as despesas do projeto aumentaram?
options: It costs more than we thought.
Due to unforeseen market dynamics and scope refinements, we've incurred additional costs, which I'd like to detail and discuss.
You'll have to pay extra.
The price went up.
correctAnswer: Due to unforeseen market dynamics and scope refinements, we've incurred additional costs, which I'd like to detail and discuss.

questionText: Você está respondendo a um competitor que ofereceu um preço menor. Como você manteria a confiança do cliente?
options: We're more expensive, but we're better.
While price is important, our comprehensive value proposition, reliability, and long-term partnership justify our investment.
Their offer is probably not as good.
Don't go with them.
correctAnswer: While price is important, our comprehensive value proposition, reliability, and long-term partnership justify our investment.

questionText: Como você sugeriria uma parceria estratégica a um rival potencial sem parecer desesperado?
options: Let's work together.
I believe our complementary strengths could generate synergies that would benefit both organizations and our respective clients.
We should partner up.
We could help each other out.
correctAnswer: I believe our complementary strengths could generate synergies that would benefit both organizations and our respective clients.

questionText: Você precisa informar a um cliente sobre uma mudança de política que o afetará. Como você o faria construtivamente?
options: We changed our policy.
We've implemented a policy adjustment that reflects industry best practices and will enhance service delivery.
You'll have to follow new rules.
Our policy is different now.
correctAnswer: We've implemented a policy adjustment that reflects industry best practices and will enhance service delivery.

questionText: Como você respeitosamente corrigiria um erro cometido pelo seu superior em uma apresentação?
options: You got that wrong.
Perhaps we might want to revisit that particular figure, as my analysis suggests a slightly different interpretation.
That's incorrect.
You made a mistake.
correctAnswer: Perhaps we might want to revisit that particular figure, as my analysis suggests a slightly different interpretation.

questionText: Você está pedindo um aumento de orçamento para um departamento. Como você justificaria isso persuasivamente?
options: We need more money.
Increasing our budget allocation would enable us to expand capacity, reduce operational friction, and accelerate revenue generation.
Give us more budget.
We deserve more resources.
correctAnswer: Increasing our budget allocation would enable us to expand capacity, reduce operational friction, and accelerate revenue generation.

questionText: Como você recusaria uma proposta de fusão mantendo relacionamentos comerciais amigáveis?
options: We don't want to merge.
While we're honored by your interest, our current strategic trajectory positions us optimally to pursue independent growth.
That's not happening.
We like being separate.
correctAnswer: While we're honored by your interest, our current strategic trajectory positions us optimally to pursue independent growth.

questionText: Você está mediando um conflito entre departamentos. Como você iniciaria a conversa?
options: You two need to get along.
Let's focus on our shared objectives and identify collaborative solutions that serve the broader organizational interests.
You're both wrong.
Figure it out together.
correctAnswer: Let's focus on our shared objectives and identify collaborative solutions that serve the broader organizational interests.

questionText: Como você profissionalmente questionaria dados financeiros suspeitos apresentados por um fornecedor?
options: These numbers don't look right.
I noticed some discrepancies in the figures provided. Could we reconcile these with supporting documentation to ensure accuracy?
You're not being honest with us.
These numbers are wrong.
correctAnswer: I noticed some discrepancies in the figures provided. Could we reconcile these with supporting documentation to ensure accuracy?

questionText: Você está apresentando um relatório trimestral que não atendeu aos objetivos. Como você enquadraria isso estrategicamente?
options: We didn't reach our goals.
While we fell short of targets this quarter, the foundational work completed positions us for accelerated performance in subsequent periods.
We didn't do well.
Our results were bad.
correctAnswer: While we fell short of targets this quarter, the foundational work completed positions us for accelerated performance in subsequent periods.

questionText: Como você comunicaria a necessidade de reestruturação organizacional minimizando preocupações dos funcionários?
options: We're changing the company structure.
This reorganization represents an opportunity to streamline operations and create more fulfilling career trajectories for our talent.
Some of you might lose your jobs.
The company is being restructured.
correctAnswer: This reorganization represents an opportunity to streamline operations and create more fulfilling career trajectories for our talent.

questionText: Um cliente importante está considerando descontinuar seus serviços. Como você abordaria uma conversa de retenção?
options: Please don't leave.
I'd welcome the opportunity to address any concerns and explore how we can better align our offerings with your evolving requirements.
You need our services.
Don't go.
correctAnswer: I'd welcome the opportunity to address any concerns and explore how we can better align our offerings with your evolving requirements.

questionText: Como você diplomáticamente sugeriria que um fornecedor antigo não está mais atendendo aos padrões de qualidade esperados?
options: Your quality is not good enough.
While we've valued our partnership, recent deliverables have diverged from previously established quality parameters we require.
You're not doing your job well.
Your work is getting worse.
correctAnswer: While we've valued our partnership, recent deliverables have diverged from previously established quality parameters we require.

questionText: Você está negociando termos de confidencialidade em uma transação delicada. Como você enquadraria a importância disso?
options: This information is secret.
Given the sensitive nature of proprietary information involved, robust confidentiality provisions are non-negotiable for us.
You can't tell anyone about this.
Keep quiet about it.
correctAnswer: Given the sensitive nature of proprietary information involved, robust confidentiality provisions are non-negotiable for us.

questionText: Como você articularia a necessidade de redução de custos sem desmotivar a equipe de liderança?
options: We need to spend less money.
We must optimize our cost structure strategically, which invites creative problem-solving and demonstrates organizational acuity.
We're cutting expenses.
Everyone needs to cost less.
correctAnswer: We must optimize our cost structure strategically, which invites creative problem-solving and demonstrates organizational acuity.

questionText: Você está enfrentando pressão de acionistas para demonstrar crescimento. Como você equilibraria expectativas e realidade?
options: We need to grow more.
While near-term pressures are acknowledged, sustainable growth requires investing in long-term value creation and market positioning.
We're trying to make more profit.
Shareholders want more money.
correctAnswer: While near-term pressures are acknowledged, sustainable growth requires investing in long-term value creation and market positioning.

questionText: Como você responderia a uma acusação de prática comercial desética mantendo sua reputação?
options: We didn't do anything wrong.
We take such allegations seriously. Our compliance framework and ethical commitments guide all our business conduct rigorously.
That's not true.
We follow the rules.
correctAnswer: We take such allegations seriously. Our compliance framework and ethical commitments guide all our business conduct rigorously.

questionText: Você está apresentando uma aquisição arriscada ao conselho. Como você enquadraria os riscos sem parecer hesitante?
options: This acquisition has risks.
While inherent risks accompany this acquisition, our comprehensive due diligence and mitigation strategies position us favorably for value realization.
It might not work out.
There are problems we need to think about.
correctAnswer: While inherent risks accompany this acquisition, our comprehensive due diligence and mitigation strategies position us favorably for value realization.

questionText: Como você comunicaria a descontinuação de um produto ao mercado sem alienar clientes leais?
options: We're stopping this product.
We're sunsetting this product to allocate resources toward innovations that better serve evolving customer needs and market dynamics.
This product is going away.
We're not making it anymore.
correctAnswer: We're sunsetting this product to allocate resources toward innovations that better serve evolving customer needs and market dynamics.

questionText: Você está negociando exclusividade com um parceiro estratégico. Como você enquadraria os benefícios mutuais?
options: We want to work only with you.
An exclusive arrangement would enable both parties to optimize resource allocation and establish a differentiated market presence.
You should work only with us.
Let's not work with anyone else.
correctAnswer: An exclusive arrangement would enable both parties to optimize resource allocation and establish a differentiated market presence.

questionText: Como você responderia a uma solicitação de isenção de termos contratais estabelecidos?
options: No, we can't do that.
While we appreciate the request, those provisions are fundamental to our risk management framework and cannot be waived.
We can't change the contract.
That's not possible.
correctAnswer: While we appreciate the request, those provisions are fundamental to our risk management framework and cannot be waived.

questionText: Você está enfrentando uma crise de relações públicas. Como você comunicaria de forma responsável aos stakeholders?
options: We made a mistake.
We're addressing this situation transparently with corrective actions underway and remain committed to regaining stakeholder confidence.
There's a problem.
We're sorry about this.
correctAnswer: We're addressing this situation transparently with corrective actions underway and remain committed to regaining stakeholder confidence.

questionText: Como você sugeriria internamente que o modelo de negócio atual pode estar obsoleto?
options: Our business model isn't working.
Market trends suggest our traditional model may require fundamental reimagining to remain competitive and capture emerging opportunities.
We need to change our business.
Things are different now.
correctAnswer: Market trends suggest our traditional model may require fundamental reimagining to remain competitive and capture emerging opportunities.

questionText: Você está solicitando que um cliente redimensione seu pedido à baixa. Como você o faria diplomaticamente?
options: We can't give you that much.
Given current supply constraints, we'd like to discuss a phased delivery approach that optimizes allocation across our client portfolio.
You'll have to take less.
We don't have enough for everyone.
correctAnswer: Given current supply constraints, we'd like to discuss a phased delivery approach that optimizes allocation across our client portfolio.

questionText: Como você articularia a necessidade de maior transparência com fornecedores sem parecer desconfiado?
options: We need to know more about your business.
Enhanced transparency in reporting mechanisms strengthens our partnership and enables us to collaborate more effectively toward shared objectives.
Tell us everything about your company.
We don't trust you right now.
correctAnswer: Enhanced transparency in reporting mechanisms strengthens our partnership and enables us to collaborate more effectively toward shared objectives.

questionText: Como você explicaria de forma clara e profissional a necessidade de um ajuste importante no cronograma do projeto?
options: The timeline needs to change.
Given evolving project complexities, we've reassessed timelines to ensure deliverable quality and team sustainability.
We need more time.
We're going to be late.
correctAnswer: Given evolving project complexities, we've reassessed timelines to ensure deliverable quality and team sustainability.

questionText: Você está apresentando resultados de uma auditoria externa que revelou pontos fracos. Como você abordaria isso construtivamente?
options: The audit found problems.
The audit findings provide valuable guidance for process improvements that will strengthen our organizational capabilities.
We have issues to fix.
There are weaknesses in our system.
correctAnswer: The audit findings provide valuable guidance for process improvements that will strengthen our organizational capabilities.

questionText: Como você responderia a um cliente que questiona a viabilidade de um projeto em andamento?
options: The project will work.
We've validated our approach and remain confident in delivering exceptional outcomes within the agreed parameters.
It's going to be fine.
Trust us on this.
correctAnswer: We've validated our approach and remain confident in delivering exceptional outcomes within the agreed parameters.

questionText: Você está solicitando que um parceiro aceite novos termos regulatórios. Como você enquadraria a mudança?
options: We need to change the terms.
Regulatory evolution requires us to adapt our framework collaboratively, ensuring continued compliance and partnership viability.
New rules mean new agreements.
We have to follow regulations.
correctAnswer: Regulatory evolution requires us to adapt our framework collaboratively, ensuring continued compliance and partnership viability.

questionText: Como você comunicaria um atraso inevitável mantendo credibilidade profissional?
options: We're going to be late.
We've identified this challenge early and are implementing mitigation strategies to minimize impact on your timeline.
There's a delay.
We can't meet the deadline.
correctAnswer: We've identified this challenge early and are implementing mitigation strategies to minimize impact on your timeline.
